changeSet.author: game-service
changeSet.comment: Partial index for the timer sweep's due-WAITING query: the table accumulates COMPLETED rows for every closed round, while the sweep polls every second and only ever cares about the few WAITING rows.
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_action_round_saga_waiting_due ON action_round_saga_state (timer_expires_at) WHERE status = 'WAITING'
